headline: Dell Voice AI Push With Deepgram And Penguin Targets Enterprise Workloads
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL), Penguin Solutions, and Deepgram are collaborating to build dedicated enterprise voice AI infrastructure. The partnership focuses on Speech-to-Text, Text-to-Speech, and Voice Agent workloads tailored for real time, low latency performance. The solution uses Dell PowerEdge servers, PowerScale storage, and NVIDIA GPUs to target demanding enterprise AI deployments. For investors watching NYSE:DELL, this move reflects how the company is positioning its hardware...
